events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves classified-area wiring methods in a heavy-industrial setting. The observed condition is "flexible cord where not permitted" while work is in-progress. NEC 500-516 covers wiring methods in classified (hazardous) locations. Flexible cords are generally not permitted as a permanent wiring method in classified areas except for very specific limited applications (like portable equipment, specific luminaire drops, etc.). Using flexible cord where not permitted in a hazardous location is a serious safety hazard - it can compromise the explosion-proof/integrity of the installation, creating ignition sources in flammable atmospheres.

This is a fail condition with high or critical risk. The immediate controls would be to stop work, remove the non-compliant flexible cord, and replace with approved rigid wiring method (e.g., rigid metal conduit, intermediate metal conduit, or other approved method per NEC 501/502/503).

Let me construct the JSON.
